name: No Bake Cookie Crumble Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1 deep dish graham cracker crust (9 oz. size)
1 cup your favorite cookies, coarsely crushed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender, sprinkle gelatin over cold milk and let stand for 2 minutes.
2. Add hot milk and blend at low speed until dissolved, about 2 minutes.
3. Add cream cheese, sugar, and vanilla extract; blend until smooth.
4. Arrange chocolate pieces in the bottom of the crust.
5. Pour the gelatin mixture into the crust and sprinkle with crushed cookies.
6. Chill for about 2 hours until firm.
Yield: 8 to 10 servings
